body.title: Add outer try-except around main loop (line 2545) + graceful shutdown on any exception path
body.result: Per-iteration try/except guard wrapping all background work in main loop (main.py:2602). Logs MAIN_LOOP_CRASH, calls _shutdown(reason), re-raises. SystemExit propagates unmodified. Committed 3fc59a1b.
body.description: main.py while True loop (~line 2545) has no outer try-except. Any unhandled exception crashes the process with zero graceful state capture — warm context not saved, in-flight turns lost. Fix: (1) wrap main loop in try-except BaseException; call _shutdown(reason=str(e)) before exit; (2) set a threading.Event instead of catching SIGTERM/SIGINT in signal handlers (currently run in whatever thread receives signal — unsafe); (3) check shutdown_event at top of each loop iteration. SRE finding from deep-audit Panel 11.
